top_signals.title: China Launches Major Crackdown on Cross-Border Stock Trading
top_signals.summary: China has launched an unprecedented campaign against illegal cross-border trading to stem capital outflows, threatening severe penalties against popular brokers and ordering non-compliant accounts to be liquidated within two years.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
